creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rakuco
Date: Fri Sep 19 16:35:27 UTC 2014
New revision: 368575
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/368575

Log:
  Update CMake to 3.0.2.

  This is a much smaller update than the previous one, and the only change
  worth mentioning on the ports side is that devel/cmake-gui now has
  USES=desktop-file-utils because it installs a .desktop file.

  PR:		193691

Changes:
  head/devel/cmake/Makefile
  head/devel/cmake/distinfo
  head/devel/cmake-gui/Makefile
  head/devel/cmake-modules/Makefile
